packageRules.description: Hold every update for 2 days after release so it clears pnpm's minimumReleaseAge supply-chain gate (24h cutoff in CI). Avoids ERR_PNPM_MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE_VIOLATION on freshly published versions.
kysely is pinned via pnpm.overrides for better-auth compatibility; 0.29.x removes DEFAULT_MIGRATION_TABLE and breaks the Next build. Do not update until better-auth no longer needs the pin.

better-call is pinned via pnpm.overrides to the version better-auth 1.6.x depends on (1.3.6). better-auth imports serializeCookie/kAPIErrorHeaderSymbol from better-call's root, which the 2.x major renamed/dropped; bumping the override past 1.3.x breaks the build and tests. The override exists to force a single better-call instance (kAPIErrorHeaderSymbol is a Symbol whose identity must match). Do not update until better-auth itself moves to better-call 2.x.
ESLint 10 is not yet supported by eslint-config-next 16.x (its rules use a removed API, breaking `eslint .`). Hold the major until eslint-config-next supports it.
